ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Jul-17-2013 Continued To Aug-14-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jonathan Ferdon for San Francisco Public Administrator.

Mr. Ferdon stated that some money was used to pay the Internal Revenue Service, that the cash on hand is $93,000.00 and explained how he came up with the pro-rata amounts/payments for the remaining Creditors. The accounting petition was continued to August 14, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Mr. Ferdon to give proper notice using the mandatory Judicial Counsel form and for Mr. Ferdon to correct the amounts/amend the accounting petition.

Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)
